dashboard_payload.canonical_rule: Payload adapter should be single frontend owner for /dashboard/payload.

architecture_reference.decision: Retire scaling of old dashboard; build new enterprise cockpit from mapped active systems.
architecture_reference.legacy_dashboard_rule: Existing dashboard remains legacy/reference until payload, runtime, search, and operator parity are proven.
architecture_reference.pack: New Cockpit Build Path From Existing Systems

must_not_do: Do not build search as a simple standalone textbox.
Do not bypass governed source trust/rate/allowlist systems.
Do not let frontend fabricate research truth.
permanent_search_panel_rule.placement: top-level command surface, not optional panel-only search

frontend/cockpit/design/.purpose: breakthroughs, advancement path, AutoDesign, blueprint viewer, validation, buildability

frontend/cockpit/intelligence/.purpose: permanent search command surface, governed web, discovery, trend, portfolio, signals

frontend/cockpit/package/.purpose: packages, acquisition fit, strategic positioning, exports

frontend/cockpit/runtime/.purpose: runtime status, active lifecycle, execution graph, run history, runtime truth, evidence queue

frontend/cockpit/shared/.purpose: shared adapters, API client, payload adapter, state store, formatters, error states

frontend/cockpit/shell/.purpose: application shell, workspace layout, navigation, docking, route state, panel registry

frontend/cockpit/system/.purpose: system health, backend status, route proof, provider readiness, governance proof

architecture_reference.source_of_truth_rule: Backend runtime APIs and canonical payload contracts own truth. Frontend owns presentation, navigation, command entry, and operator interaction.

build_sequence.name: Cockpit Root + Legacy Dashboard Freeze Marker
build_sequence.purpose: Create frontend/cockpit skeleton and mark old dashboard as legacy reference without deleting it.

build_sequence.name: Cockpit Shell + Workspace Manager
build_sequence.purpose: Create stable shell, layout, navigation, workspace manager, and panel registry.

build_sequence.name: Shared API Client + Canonical Payload Adapter
build_sequence.purpose: Create the single frontend adapter for /dashboard/payload and /dashboard/payload/status.

build_sequence.name: Permanent Search Command Surface
build_sequence.purpose: Build search panel as command/search/research surface from the start.
build_sequence.runtime_change: frontend integration with existing search/provider routes

build_sequence.name: Runtime + Lifecycle Panels
build_sequence.purpose: Render active runtime state, 30-stage lifecycle, run history, terminal states, runtime truth/evidence.

build_sequence.name: Intelligence Workspace
build_sequence.purpose: Render governed web, discovery, trends, portfolio, signals.

build_sequence.name: Design + Breakthrough Workspace
build_sequence.purpose: Render breakthrough, advancement path, AutoDesign, Design Portal/blueprints, validation/buildability.
build_sequence.runtime_change: consume existing payload/design route outputs where available

build_sequence.name: Package + Export Workspace
build_sequence.purpose: Render package, acquisition fit, positioning, exports.

build_sequence.name: Cockpit Parity Gate
build_sequence.purpose: Compare old dashboard against new cockpit and prove payload/runtime/search parity before retirement.

non_negotiable_constraints: Do not scale the old dashboard.
Do not delete legacy dashboard until parity is proven.
Do not add new cockpit panels without registering them in panel registry.
Do not create more than one canonical payload fetch owner.
Do not build search without governed web/source-trust awareness.
Do not let UI become the source of runtime truth.
Do not redesign cockpit again after v19.65+ without a failed parity reason.
pack: New Cockpit Build Path From Existing Systems
phase_decision: Map-complete enough to define cockpit build path; implementation should begin only after this blueprint is reviewed.

safety.note: This pack creates build-path reports and tests only.
